articles.title_en: Permanent Mission of the Russian Federation to the UN: The West does not hide that it needs Ukraine as a source of resources
articles.lead_en: Deputy Permanent Representative Dmitry Chumakov recalled in the context of resources the military interventions in Iraq, Libya and Syria, where “the battle for political influence was accompanied by a struggle for natural resources”
articles.title_raw: Постпредство РФ при ООН: Запад не скрывает, что Украина ему нужна как источник ресурсов
articles.lead_raw: Заместитель постпреда Дмитрий Чумаков напомнил в контексте ресурсов о военных интервенциях в Ирак, Ливию и Сирию, где "битва за политическое влияние сопровождалась борьбой за природные ресурсы"

articles.title_en: Wildberries is doing everything possible for the safety of its employees
articles.lead_en: All facilities are protected by the same means of protection as any other industrial facilities in Russia, including air defense forces, said Tatyana Kim
articles.title_raw: Wildberries делает все возможное для безопасности своих сотрудников
articles.lead_raw: Все объекты защищены теми же средствами защиты, что и любые другие промышленные объекты в России, в том числе силами ПВО, заявила Татьяна Ким

articles.title_en: 80 Ukrainian UAVs shot down over Russian regions
articles.lead_en: Air defense forces destroyed the drones between 08:00 and 20:00 Moscow time
articles.title_raw: Над регионами России сбили 80 украинских БПЛА
articles.lead_raw: Силы ПВО уничтожили дроны в период с 08:00 до 20:00 мск

articles.title_en: Medvedev called on United Russia to pay attention to the development of military production
articles.lead_en: We are also talking about providing participants in a special military operation with the most modern weapons, said the party chairman
articles.title_raw: Медведев призвал единороссов уделить внимание развитию военного производства
articles.lead_raw: Речь идет также об обеспечении участников специальной военной операции самым современным оружием, заявил председатель партии

articles.title_en: Ukraine’s new commander-in-chief, Mykhailo Drapatyi draws reactions from Kyiv, Moscow, and the West — including visible concern from Russian war bloggers
articles.lead_en: Mykhailo Drapatyi became commander in chief of Ukraine’s armed forces on the evening of July 21, replacing Oleksandr Syrskyi. The appointment capped a conflict between Syrskyi and Defense Minister Mykhailo Fedorov: Zelensky fired Fedorov, prompting protesters to take to the streets on the ex-minister’s behalf, and Syrskyi’s resignation followed.
articles.title_raw: Ukraine’s new commander-in-chief, Mykhailo Drapatyi draws reactions from Kyiv, Moscow, and the West — including visible concern from Russian war bloggers
articles.lead_raw: Mykhailo Drapatyi became commander in chief of Ukraine’s armed forces on the evening of July 21, replacing Oleksandr Syrskyi. The appointment capped a conflict between Syrskyi and Defense Minister Mykhailo Fedorov: Zelensky fired Fedorov, prompting protesters to take to the streets on the ex-minister’s behalf, and Syrskyi’s resignation followed.
